name: PT Multi Agro Gemilang Plantation Tbk
summary: PT Multi Agro Gemilang Plantation Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the oil palm plantation business in Indonesia. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Multi Agro Gemilang Plantation Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Santika Griya Persada.
